name: Crossroads Baptist School
description: Come play pickleball at Crossroads Baptist School in Valdosta, GA! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. Chalk lines have been drawn, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are private.
hours: Mon - Thur 9:00 a.m. - 5:00 p.m. Newsletter Sign up for our Weekly 411 email newsletter to stay up-to-date with what's going on at Crossroads! Sign Up! Employment Opportunities Copyright © 2026 Crossroads Baptist Church | Valdosta

name: Harry B. Anderson Tennis Center
description: Come play pickleball at Harry B. Anderson Tennis Center in Valdosta, GA! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Mckey Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mckey Park in Valdosta, GA! There are 12 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Scintilla Charter Academy
description: Scintilla Charter Academy is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Valdosta, GA. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Valdosta YMCA
description: Valdosta YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Valdosta, GA. The court surface is wood. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
